videos.video_subject: The timeline disproving the myth that Roy Keane's 2001 tackle immediately ended Alf-Inge Haaland's career
videos.video_script: This timeline destroys football's biggest myth. Roy Keane's tackle did not end Alfie Haaland's career. Haaland finished the match, played for Norway four days later, and appeared in City's next league game. His later operation was on the opposite knee. So why does football keep ignoring this timeline?
videos.video_terms: Alf Inge Haaland continued playing after tackle, Alf Inge Haaland Norway 2001, Alf Inge Haaland Manchester City 2001, Roy Keane Haaland tackle aftermath, Roy Keane Manchester derby 2001, Alfie Haaland knee surgery career myth
